summary: TemaDom Phase 3 Soft Launch testing completed successfully. All visual and functional features working: dark theme (#1E2A38), TemaDom logo in navbar and footer, gradient text hero, feedback button with star rating modal, PageInstructions on major pages, registration with 3 tabs and Company/Master dropdown with Bulstat field. All 18 backend API tests passed including POST/GET /api/feedback endpoints.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/feedback - submit feedback with rating 200
✅ Backend: POST /api/feedback with rating only - success
✅ Backend: GET /api/feedback - returns feedback list with avg_rating
✅ Backend: GET /api/stats - returns total_projects, total_companies, total_reviews
✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/register company without bulstat - correctly rejected 400
✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/register company with bulstat - success
✅ Frontend: TemaDom logo visible in navbar (h-[88px])
✅ Frontend: Hero promo banner 'ТЕСТОВ РЕЖИМ — ВСИЧКИ ФУНКЦИИ БЕЗПЛАТНИ'
✅ Frontend: Stats row (6+ Фирми, 0+ Проекти, 28 Области, 0+ Отзиви)
✅ Frontend: Feedback button (purple, bottom-left at x=24, y=1008)
✅ Frontend: Feedback modal with 5 star rating, name input, text area, submit button
✅ Frontend: Subscriptions page with Базов/Про/Премиум/Дизайнер plans (Тестов режим)
✅ Frontend: AI Designer page with PageInstructions and 100/100 counter
✅ Frontend: Ads page with dark theme and test ad displayed
✅ Frontend: Registration page 3 tabs: Клиент, Фирма/Майстор, Дизайнер
✅ Frontend: Firma/Maystor tab dropdown: Майстор (физическо лице), Фирма (юридическо лице)
✅ Frontend: Company selection shows Булстат (ЕИК) field
critical_code_review_comments: Dark theme implemented consistently with bg-[#1E2A38] and #253545 for cards
Orange (#FF8C42) used as primary accent color throughout
Feedback system properly stores rating, text, and name in MongoDB
PageInstructions component correctly used on Projects, Companies, AI Designer, Subscriptions pages
Registration form properly validates company bulstat (9 digits)
seed_data_creation: Test users created via pytest registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: TemaDom Phase 3 fully tested. New features: Feedback button (purple, bottom-left) with star rating modal; PageInstructions on major pages; Registration with 3 tabs (Client/Firma-Master/Designer) and Company requires 9-digit Bulstat; TemaDom logo in navbar and footer; Dark theme (#1E2A38) with orange (#FF8C42) accents. All API endpoints working: /api/feedback (POST/GET), all existing endpoints from v10.8 still operational.

dark_theme.details: Background #1E2A38 (rgb(30,42,56)), cards #253545, text white/slate, accent orange #FF8C42

navbar_logo.details: TemaDom logo visible with h-[88px], positioned top-left

footer_logo.details: 2 TemaDom logos in footer - one in content section, one at bottom center

hero_section.details: Gradient text 'с AI технологии', promo banner, stats row with 28 Области

feedback_button.details: Purple button (#8C56FF) at bottom-left (x=24, y=1008), opens modal with 5 stars

feedback_modal.details: Star rating, name input, text area, submit button all functional

feedback_api.details: POST /api/feedback works, GET /api/feedback returns list with avg_rating

subscriptions_page.details: Shows Базов/Про/Премиум for companies, Дизайнер for designers, all 'Тестов режим'

ads_page.details: Dark theme, test mode banner, ads list displayed

registration_company_dropdown.details: Dropdown shows: Майстор (физическо лице), Фирма (юридическо лице)

registration_bulstat.details: Булстат (ЕИК) field appears when Company selected, validates 9 digits

page_instructions.details: PageInstructions component found on Projects, Companies, AI Designer pages with steps/benefits/video button

calculator_page.details: Renders with dark theme, requires registration

companies_page.details: Dark theme, PageInstructions, companies grid with ratings
